title: Lunch: Pisto (zucchini, eggplant, red pepper, tomato) topped with a fried egg, side of manchego cheese and jamón, with a slice of crusty rustic bread [Coach: Now THIS is a beautifully balanced plate 🥗 — non-starchy veggies leading the way, an egg and cheese and jamón stacking up serious protein, and just enough bread to anchor things. With BG at 94 going in, this should glide up gently and stay in a lovely range.]

Breakfast: 1 chocolate-topped biscuit (Príncipe-style) [Cumulative Breakfast: ~30g carbs total] [Coach: A little chocolate cap 🍫 — bumps the breakfast carbs up a notch but the protein and avocado fat from the sandwich help slow things. Should still land in a comfortable range; just enjoy the rest of the morning.]

Breakfast: Small piece of toasted ham and cheese sandwich with a side of sliced avocado [Coach: Lovely balanced little breakfast 🥑 — the avocado brings healthy fats and fiber, the ham and cheese cover protein, and the toast is a modest carb anchor. BG at 100 should rise gently and land in a comfortable range.]

Lunch: 1 slice of dense whole-grain/rye bread and 3 fresh strawberries [Cumulative Lunch: ~50g carbs total] [Coach: A nice finish to round out the meal — strawberries are low-glycemic and fiber-rich, and the dense bread brings slow carbs that'll help bring your BG back up steadily after that earlier low. Cumulative load lands at ~50g, well within range.]

Lunch: Frejoles (green beans) with potatoes and crumbled boiled egg in tomato broth, plus 3-4 slices of cured jamón [Coach: Eating now is exactly right — BG is 66 trending down so the beans and potato carbs will lift you while the egg and jamón add steady protein. Beans bring fiber and slow-release carbs, ideal for stabilizing your sugar. If still low, a small piece of fruit gives faster recovery.]

Lunch: Bowl of cubed fresh papaya (~1 cup) [Cumulative Lunch: ~53g carbs total] [Coach: Papaya is a wonderful T2D-friendly fruit — fiber and natural enzymes, lower glycemic than most tropical fruits. Pairs beautifully with the protein and avocado fats from the sandwich which slow the rise. You're crushing this lunch.]

Lunch: Whole-wheat sandwich with ham, avocado, and fresh greens (spinach/lettuce) [Coach: Beautifully balanced — avocado for healthy fats, ham for protein, greens for fiber, and whole-wheat bread keeps the carbs reasonable. This is exactly the kind of plate we want at lunch. A slice of cheese next time would bump protein and satiety further.]

Lunch: Crusty bread piece with butter and 4 fresh strawberries [Cumulative Lunch: ~61g carbs total] [Coach: Strawberries are a lovely low-glycemic finish — fiber-rich and naturally sweet. The bread does stack the carbs to ~61g total, but the steak's protein plus butter on the bread slow absorption nicely, and your earlier walk helps too.]

Lunch: Beef steak (medallion ~5 oz) with sautéed mushrooms and a small side of french fries [Coach: Excellent lunch balance — the steak brings ~35g of solid protein, and the sautéed mushrooms add fiber and depth without spiking sugar. Fries are the main carb but the portion is sensible. Starting at 130 BG you're set up for a smooth post-meal ride.]

Breakfast: Whole-wheat ham and apple sandwich with a no-sugar latte [Coach: Beautifully built breakfast — putting the apple right inside the sandwich with the ham is exactly the protein-and-fat pairing we talked about, and the milk in the latte adds more protein on top. Plus your starting BG is in a much better spot today (91 vs yesterday's 141), so the peak should land lower than it has been this week.]
